text:
The sun glowed softly over the ocean. A young man named Leo walked through the grass, searching his pockets for something he couldn’t find. A butterfly landed on his nose.

“Did you lose something?” it asked.

“I guess I forgot my camera.”

A woman approached with a golden pocket watch. “Your lost pet?”

“No. My heart.”

She placed it in his hand.

“Do stars like you see?”

“They make us happy.”

Leo smiled. The watch gleamed.

They went for a walk. A girl named Willow lived nearby. They listened to her read poems from a book.

“Why do we love stars?”

“Dreams take us there.”

They saw an owl.

“Where do owls go?”

“Where dreams come true.”

They sat on a log. The moonlit owl flew away.

“You’re lovely.”

“Thanks.”

“Do owls have favorites?”

“One old one loves sleeping.”

Later, they saw a hawk.

“We look alike…”
